design_plan: rng=42; AIDA: Attention—centered cinematic hero for executives; Interest—real computer-use + cache; Desire—time saved, fewer pings, safer than DIY agents; Action—clear primary CTA. Hero math: 72px clamp, max-width 1120px for 2–3 lines. Bento density validated via grid-auto-flow:dense. Label sweep: all competitors mentioned. Button contrast: black/white pills on paper. Animations guarded.
headline: A real personal assistant for busy executives — one that actually does the work

site_brief.audience: busy executives who want a real personal assistant
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: busy executives who want a real personal assistant AI assistant
busy executives who want a real personal assistant personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

summary: Super is built for executives who need more than a chat window. It’s a personal AI agent that operates real software, handles repeat workflows, and gets better over time by reusing a computer-use cache — positioning it as a sharper alternative to chat-first assistants.
